geography.data_source: MCGM ward boundaries (K/East, K/West wards mapped to numeric IDs); includes SEEPZ/MIDC industrial areas; area from MCGM Development Plan 2034

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 K-ward Mumbai suburban district; density = population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round Mumbai suburban mid-income estimates; literacy from Census 2011; SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 Mumbai suburban mid-income quintile adjusted for Andheri's commercial density; distribution slightly right-skewed reflecting SEEPZ/IT salaries; informal rate from NSSO 78th Round; occupations from SEEPZ employment data, Film City/Goregaon media cluster proximity, and Andheri's major coaching center belt

commute_profile.data_source: Andheri is the busiest suburban railway station in Mumbai; Metro Line 1 (Versova-Andheri-Ghatkopar) already operational; MCTS 2016 mode share for K-ward TAZs; auto-rickshaw dominant last-mile mode from MCTS; metro dependency high due to operational Line 1

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Mid-range fare sensitivity; high examination sensitivity reflecting major coaching belt (IIT-JEE, NEET, CA prep centers along SV Road); institutional trust from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Mumbai suburban sub-sample; political mobilisation from Andheri West/East Assembly constituency data 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Mixed network reflecting transit hub + commercial character; moderate clustering from diverse residential communities; cross-income bridging from SEEPZ industrial workers interacting with IT professionals

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Vendors at Andheri station west exit; footfall from Western Railway Andheri station boarding data (~800K daily, busiest station in Mumbai)
Informal service economy around SEEPZ/MIDC industrial area; food stalls, transport, photostat services; from MIDC employment data
Lokhandwala Complex retail and commercial area; MCGM trade license data for K-West ward
Coaching center cluster along SV Road and Andheri West — IIT-JEE, NEET, CA, CET prep; estimated from coaching center directory listings and student enrollment data
Andheri East industrial belt (Saki Naka, Marol area); MIDC registration data and MCGM industrial license records
Versova Koliwada fishing village; Maharashtra Fisheries Department village-level data

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Transit Hub/Mixed template from AGENT_SPEC.md adjusted: student raised to 0.11 reflecting major coaching belt; tech_knowledge_worker added at 0.10 for SEEPZ/IT presence; migrant_worker reduced; sum verified = 1.00

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts from MCGM corporator data for K-ward, coaching industry associations, Andheri press club membership
